parameters.query:
SELECT id, webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.body.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Delete Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Delete Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Delete Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1

UPDATE caiac.documents
SET deleted_at = NOW()
WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
AND filename = '{{ $json.filename }}'
AND deleted_at IS NULL

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [ { key: 'source', match: { value: $('Check Token Valid').item.json.filename } }, { key: 'client_id', match: { value: $('Check Token Valid').item.json.client_slug } } ] } }) }}
